content: Kenney assets are CC0 1.0 (public domain): free for any/commercial use, modification, redistribution; attribution appreciated not required; but the Kenney LOGO is reserved (don't ship it). itch.io 'CC0' tag is community-applied and not all packs tagged CC0 actually are — verify each pack's own license page. Mistakes: assuming an itch pack is CC0 from a tag, mixing in a non-CC0 sprite, or bundling a readme/credits file claiming a wrong license. Keep a LICENSES/CREDITS file recording each asset's source+license.
